summary: Seasoned, professional, forward-looking Software Engineer with 7+ years' background in developing and executing innovative software solutions to enhance business productivity. Highly experienced in all aspects of full Stack Software Development, using enterprise best practices and advanced technical skill. Have worked in Agile lifecycle with DevOps, coordinating with cross-functional teams and clients at a fast paced, deadline driven environment to steer timely solution delivery.

responsibilities: Working on KBX Logistics project which deals with transporting of packages and shipments across international/intranational borders with shipment tracking and administration by application users.
Roles and Responsibilities include working with team of 7 members collaboratively, client interaction for requirement understanding in Agile lifecycle using Azure DevOps Application.

Hands on backend modifying DB Objects in SQL Server, GRPC services, RESTful APIs in .NET Core and C# as backend services and frontend working with Angular 13 with RxJS, shared services and Lazy loading with advanced concepts.
Application is based on Microservice architechture and Docker containers. The project is using Datadog for services monitoring and ArgoCd for kubernetes cluster management.
Have been following SOLID principle with Dependency Injection Design pattern.
Following every enterprise best practices while coding, writing and executing unit test cases in both backend with NUnit and frontend with karma - jasmine with adhering to code review comments.
Worked on Inception project for displaying Sales, System and configurations data of Dell EMC and subsidiary products for Sales operation and Leadership team.
Roles and Responsibilities include working with team of 5 members collaboratively, client interaction for requirement understanding in Agile lifecycle.
Had followed SOLID principle with Dependency Injection Design pattern.

Hands on RESTful Web API in .NET Framework and C# and frontend working with Angular 8 with RxJS and Lazy loading advanced technologies.
